name_en: 💋💋💋【Original Factory Leather with 🌈(Cdfmall Sanya Duty-Free Shop Tote】🔥🔥GG Marmont Mini features original imported Italian factory leather, top-tier matching hardware, and soft leather that highlights the texture. It's a sure eye-catcher on the street! Versatile carrying styles: crossbody, shoulder, handbag, or waist bag. The size is just right, easily holding a phone, lipstick, coin purse, and tissues. A year-round essential with original factory leather quality!! Style No.: 476433, Dimensions: 16.5cmx9.5cmx4.5cm
